# Countist

> Countist is an AI-powered subscription tracker that helps individuals identify overpayments, detect duplicate and overlapping services, and visualize renewal dates — without connecting to a bank account.

## What is Countist?

Countist is a web application (app.countist.app) that lets users manually track all their subscription services in one place. The app uses AI to analyze subscription portfolios and surface:

- **Price anomalies**: subscriptions where the user is paying more than the current advertised rate
- **Overlap detection**: services with overlapping functionality (e.g., two cloud storage tools)
- **Duplicate detection**: the same service subscribed to twice
- **Smart tips**: personalized recommendations to reduce spend
- **Calendar view**: all renewal dates in a single monthly calendar view

## Key facts

- **Pricing**: $4.99/month or $49/year. 14-day free trial included.
- **Privacy model**: No bank connections, ever. All data is manually entered by the user.
- **Data policy**: User data is never sold, shared, or used for advertising.
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Contact**: countist@structurl.io

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://countist.app/) — Overview of Countist, key stats, and feature highlights
- [Pricing](https://countist.app/pricing) — Plan details and pricing breakdown
- [FAQs](https://countist.app/faqs) — Common questions answered
- [Contact](https://countist.app/contact) — Get in touch with the team

## App

The Countist app is available at [app.countist.app](https://app.countist.app). Authentication is handled via Clerk. Payments are processed via Stripe.

## Mission

Countist was built because most people underestimate their subscription spend by 2.5x (Recurly), 42% forget about subscriptions and keep paying (C+R Research), and 89% of consumers underestimate their monthly subscription costs (West Monroe). Countist makes the invisible visible without compromising financial privacy.
